WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_11_Payout6_0: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right (for bottom-left reels) and from the rightmost reel to the left (for top-right reels).
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_12_Payout6_1: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols on each symbol from the leftmost reel to the right (for bottom-left reels) and from the rightmost reel to the left (for top-right reels).
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_2: Heist Thief symbol and Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spin, a Heist Thief symbol may appear on any reels.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At any round after wins are paid, the Heist Thief symbol will move up one position (if it is at bottom-left reels) or move down one position (if it is at the top-right reels).
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: When the Heist Thief symbol reaches any of the Vaults, all symbols that are on the same reel as that Vault will be transformed into Wild symbols, and the Heist Thief symbol will jump to a randomly chosen position on the reels.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: During any spin, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown above the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_4_Payout3_4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: During the Free Spins Feature, the multipliers above the reels will be increased to x2, x4, x6 and x10 respectively.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_3: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, a Heist Thief symbol is added to the reels and will remain on the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_4_Payout4_4: +1 symbol appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 1 more free spin.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule5_1_Payout5_1: The maximum win amount is %{2500}x of the bet amount.
WildHeistCashoutPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule5_2_Payout5_2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{2500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

WildHeistCashoutRule.Rule1_1: Wild Heist Cashout is a double 5-reel (for both bottom-left reels and top-right reels, 5 rows in reel 1, 4 rows in reel 2, 3 rows in reel 3, 2 rows in reel 4 and 1 row in reel 5) video slot featuring a chance of a travelling Wild symbol and stacked Wild symbols.
WildHeistCashoutRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for 240 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
WildHeistCashoutRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
